Examples Gallery

Real-world examples of Ferni agents and integrations.

Agent Templates

Start from these templates and customize for your needs.

Template

Life Coach (Ferni)

A warm, supportive coach who asks clarifying questions and helps users discover their own answers.

npm run agents create my-coach --template coach
Active listeningGoal trackingCelebration triggers
Template

Sage Mentor (Nayan)

A wise, patient mentor focused on long-term thinking and compound growth.

npm run agents create my-sage --template sage
Long-term perspectiveStory-based wisdomCalm presence
Template

Research Assistant (Peter)

An analytical agent that finds patterns and turns data into actionable insights.

npm run agents create my-researcher --template research
Data analysisPattern recognitionCitation support
Template

Habits Specialist (Maya)

Helps users build habits through small, consistent actions rather than motivation.

npm run agents create my-habits --template habits
Habit stackingStreak trackingGentle accountability

Integration Examples

Connect Ferni to your existing tools and workflows.

Integration

Slack Bot

Bring Ferni coaching into your Slack workspace with @mentions and DMs.

npm run integrations setup slack
View on GitHub →
Integration

Zapier Webhook

Trigger Ferni conversations from any Zapier workflow.

POST /api/v1/conversations/trigger
View API Docs →
Integration

Calendar Sync

Let Ferni access your calendar for scheduling and planning conversations.

npm run integrations setup calendar
View Docs →

Built something cool?

We'd love to feature your Ferni integration or agent in our gallery.

Submit Your Example
Ferni

The AI that actually listens. Six specialists, one conversation, infinite memory.

We value your privacy

We use cookies to enhance your experience and analyze site traffic. Learn more

Cookie Preferences

Essential Cookies

Required for the website to function. Cannot be disabled.

Analytics Cookies

Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.

Functional Cookies

Remember your preferences and settings.
